rootCauseClass: not_active_on_current_head; closest risk class D over class A module-level state ownership

tests.name: coalesces concurrent identical requests into one backend invocation
tests.intent: Protect the director production report in-flight coalescing contract.
tests.expectedBehavior: Two identical concurrent requests share one backend invocation.

tests.name: returns a client hot-cache hit without invoking the backend again
tests.expectedBehavior: Second same-fingerprint request reuses the first artifact result.

tests.name: invalidates the client hot-cache when the screen data fingerprint changes
tests.intent: Prevent stale reuse when meaningful source data changes.

tests.name: does not persist a client hot-cache entry without a screen data fingerprint
tests.intent: Prevent cache reuse when no deterministic source identity exists.
tests.expectedBehavior: Requests without fingerprint each invoke backend.

tests.name: clears in-flight ownership after a failed backend invocation
tests.intent: Ensure failed tasks do not poison future same-key opens.
tests.expectedBehavior: First same-key call rejects; second same-key call invokes backend again and succeeds.

tests.name: isolates module-level cache state when the test boundary reloads the module
tests.intent: Protect test isolation around module-level cache/in-flight maps.
tests.expectedBehavior: After jest.resetModules, the same key does not reuse previous module cache state.
